description_en: Revenu Québec administers provincial tax laws for Quebec, including QST, QPP, and QPIP. Businesses must register here for QST collection and employer accounts.
description_fr: Revenu Québec administre les lois fiscales provinciales du Québec, notamment la TVQ, le RRQ et le RQAP.

QST_registration.description_en: Register for QST when your annual taxable supplies exceed $30,000 CAD
QST_registration.how_to_register_en: Register online via clicSÉQUR – Entreprises portal or by phone at 1-800-567-4692

employer_account.description_en: Required when you hire employees — used for provincial income tax withholding, QPP, and QPIP remittances

clicsequr.description_en: Quebec's secure online portal for businesses to manage tax accounts, file returns, and make payments
